description: A customer (Leonie Köhler) needs separate invoices for her purchase on Invoice #1. Currently, Invoice #1 contains two tracks: 'Balls to the Wall' and 'Restless and Wild'. Split these into two separate invoices for Customer 2 (Leonie Köhler) dated 2009-01-01 with the billing address Theodor-Heuss-Straße 34, Stuttgart, BW, Germany, 70174. Move the line item for track 'Restless and Wild' (Track ID 4) from Invoice #1 to a new invoice, ensuring both invoices have a total of $0.99. Save the database.
